title: Murkrid PvP Optimized
description: A complete Minecraft PvP/Content Creator modpack
body:
## What does it offer-

### Mods
- A complete FPS boost  (Sodium, Lithium etc.)
- PvP Practice (HeroBot, WorldEdit)

  And much more!!

### Resource Packs
- Murkrid PvP Pack (which will be released soon or has already released officially on Modrinth)


## Why should you download it-

The problem with most modpacks is that they don't keep the vanilla vibe while optimizing, and also there are way too many optimization mods and very less PvP mods. My Modpack does exactly the thing you want. This Modpack keeps the vanilla look of the game while not over - burdening
yur computer with optimization mods + having more focus on PvP mods and settings.

I will soon be releasing a video showcasing this modpack [here](https://www.youtube.com/@Murkrid)
